title: Piquant Smoky Argentinian Rice Noodles
description: A smoky and snappy solo dinner dish featuring rice noodles and tempering chocolate, inspired by Argentinian cuisine, this shojin friendly meal is perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions
In a small bowl, mix together the smoked paprika, tempering chocolate, and argentinian chimichurri sauce
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the minced garlic
Cook the garlic for 1-2 minutes until fragrant
Add the cooked rice noodles to the skillet and toss with the garlic and oil
Add the smoked paprika and chocolate mixture to the skillet and toss to combine
Season with salt and black pepper to taste
Serve the noodles hot, garnished with additional chimichurri sauce if desired
